Warrant Discharged
DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED
SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RECEIVED 051021

/CAL: DISPOSITION/TN: MARTIN VALLEJO MANCIAS/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONSOF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 21002456,/VD: HEARING DATE OF 07-23-21/

/CAL:TRLG 21002456/CONTD ELIG RPT FROM JPS/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:07-06-21/S22/CONTD: RECEIPTOF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL/

/CAL:TRLG 21002456 & POSS ACM RELEASE TO HR360/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/ACM/CTORD:DEFT TO PARTICIPATE IN HR360 PROGRAM AND REPORT TO ACM 5 X A WEEK BYPHONE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED/

/CAL:TRLG 21002456/CONTD ELIG RPT FROM DPH/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM FOR MHDELIGIBILITY/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1001,36, THE DEFENDANT IS REFERRED TO THE DEPARTMENT /X:OF PUBLIC HEALTH FOR A MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ /DPH/REP:05-18-21/S22/CONTD: RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM THE DEPT, OF PUBLICHEALTH/DOP/

/CAL:TRAILING 21002456/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING HOME DETENTION AT HR360 BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:REPORT TO ACM 5X WEEK BY PHONE/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED AND FILED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE 04-19-21 HEARING IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING, TRIALING 21002456/CONTD: 04-14-21 TO SETPRELIMINARY HEARING, TRAILING 21002456/DOP/CONTD: 04-19-21 TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING, TRAILING 21002456/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/CTORD:WARRANT DISCHARGED/30    CACMELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/NB/X:SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 04-05-21/DOP/X:HEARING DATE OF 04-05-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: HOME DETENTION TO HEALTH RIGHT 360/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: THE COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE COURT DATE/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: THE DEFENDANT APPEARS VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/987,2/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHTTO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD: ACM ICR/DOP/
/CAL:POSS DISPO/VD:07-23-21/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITH FORDISPO/
/CAL:MHD ELIG RPT/DAWT/CONTD:POSSIBLE DISPO/X:THE 07-23-21 HEARING IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:TRAILING #21002456/X:FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/
/CAL:TRLG 21002456/CONT/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/BWDNC/CTORD:SHERIFF'S WARRANT DISCHARGED/CONTD:TRAILING 21002456/DOP/
/CAL:MHD ELIG RPT & MOT TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:1500/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/ /VD:06-04-21/

/CAL:TRAILING 21002456, PRE PX M12/DAWT/CONT/
